name: 00-phpmyadmin-logout
condition: ${request.method == 'GET' and request.headers['Host'] != null and request.headers['Host'][0] != null and matches(request.headers['Host'][0], '(?i)^phpmyadmin-c[.]sso[.]local(:[0-9]+)?$') and matches(request.uri.path, '^/$') and request.uri.query != null and matches(request.uri.query, '(^|&)logout=1($|&)')}
